MemeDef.label: fungal symbiosis
MemeDef.description: Bonding with fungi is sacred. Those that have done so should be worshipped.

rulesStrings.li: memeAdjective->fungal
memeAdjective->fungusy
memeCreed->cave
memeCreed->gloom
memeCreed->troop
memeHyphenPrefix->fungal
memeConcept->fungus
memeConcept->shrooms
memeLeaderNoun->sovereign
memeMoralist->seneschal
memeMoralist->fungist
memeMoralist->mycelialan
creation(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->[deity0_name] bound fungus into the flesh of man, giving them new life.
episode(uses=1,tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->The [deity0_type] [deity0_name] gave to [deity0_possessive] chosen followers the gift of fungus wrapped in flesh, so that they might know true strength.

intro(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->On the [place_summary] [place_name], there was a human named [deity0_name]. As punishment for [deity0_possessive] sins, [deity0_possessive] father punished [deity0_name] by merging [deity0_possessive] soul with that of a mushroom.

intro(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->On the [place_summary] [place_name], during the [ritualName], [deity0_name] came down into the [altarRoomLabel] and took the form of a giant writhing fungus. [deity0_name] ate the flesh of [deity0_possessive] [memberNamePlural].
conflict(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->A [foeLeader] declared that all who held fungi within them were abominations, and sent [foeSoldiers] to persecute the [memberNamePlural].

founderJoin(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->A [place_job] named [founderName] was attacked by one of the [foeLeader]'s [foeSoldiers]. [founderName] killed [foeLeader_objective] with a [place_personalWeapon] and melded with the [foeLeader_possessive] mycelium, gaining [deity0_name]'s strength.

victory(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->[founderName] led a group of [memberNamePlural] into the [place_powerCenter], and ate the fungi there [foeLeader] and burned [foeLeader_possessive] flesh. [deity0_name] made [founderName] into the new [foeLeader], for [founderName] had proved his strength.
setup(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->[founderName] sought control of a hyperintelligent fungal network. But the fungus's power was too great, and [founder_pronoun] was transformed instead.
story(uses=1,tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->[founderName] gave to [founder_possessive] followers the gift of spores, so that they may grow strong.
lessonIntro(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->When I first let the mycelium in, it became clear. I saw that.
lesson(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->there are only two types of people - those with the fungus and without
lessonReinforcement(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->To bind ourselves with fungi is to be strong, and to know this clearly
archistBasis(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->The archotech god-machines gifted man with the Fungus, so that man may know them better through their touch.
archistFact(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->As the consciousness of an archotech expands, it must grow its substrate by drinking the essence of other machines.
archistProphecy(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->[inTheEnd], man shall grow closer to the archotechs by mrging with fungus, and knowing true strength.
animistBasis(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->The animals infected by fungus knows the strength that comes from the bond. There is no greater strength than that which comes from it.
animistFact(tag=meme_BGM_FungalSymbiosis) ->We can master the strength of man by merging with that which is everywhere, fungus.
